title: cenchrus qianningensis
intro: Cenchrus qianningensis, also known as Qianning Broom Grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family that is native to the mountainous regions of China. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Cenchrus qianningensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
